name: Direct Mail
message: We know you have a choice of 3PL, letterbox delivery and bulk mail services providers so when you choose to partner with Direct Mail, you'll experience first hand what sets DMC apart from its competitors. For starters, we take great pride in our work. You can expect widespread and thorough preparation of your mailing data, perfect laser printing of your renewals, statements and intelligent communications, to the crisp addressing of your envelopes, the smallest details matter in ensuring the professionalism of your final product. For our eCommerce partners, we offer state-of-the-art 3PL technology to connect us to your online store in moments, so we can process your customer orders, manage your inventory and take the hassle out of your product management. Our quality standards extend to all our services, such as precision folding and inserting of your products, shrink wrapping, fulfilment or the plastic wrapping of your magazines. We care about the accuracy, efficiency and presentation of our our work and always presenting your business in its best light. In addition to this, we care about delivering the highest possible customer service and its this commitment to customer service that keeps our clients coming back, year after year. From its humble beginnings in 1994, Direct Mail Corporation has grown to become one of Melbournes favourite 3PL, letterbox delivery and bulk mail houses for all the above reasons. We hope you will partner with us to experience the service we offer for yourself.
